_comment: Code-health ratchet for dotfiles. Values can only decrease. Pre-commit hook fails if any metric exceeds its ceiling. See docs/engineering-philosophy.md and scripts/check_baselines.py for the metric definitions.

counts._comment: Anti-pattern counts. Run `python3 scripts/check_baselines.py --auto-ratchet` to lock improvements after a cleanup PR.

file_ceilings._comment: Per-file line ceilings on the largest scripts. New entries should be added when refactoring locks in a gain.
